name: MikroTik Rackmount Kit
title: MikroTik Rackmount Kit
short_description: The kit of two rackmount ears and four screws
description: The MikroTik Rackmount Kit, model RMK-2/10, is a specially designed accessory that enables the secure installation of MikroTik devices into standard 19-inch racks. This kit is ideal for network engineers and IT professionals looking to integrate MikroTik products into a structured server or networking rack, providing a seamless and secure fit for optimal operation and management.

detailed_description.heading: Secure Installation in Standard Racks
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik Rackmount Kit, model RMK-2/10, is a specially designed accessory that enables the secure installation of MikroTik devices into standard 19-inch racks. This kit is ideal for network engineers and IT professionals looking to integrate MikroTik products into a structured server or networking rack, providing a seamless and secure fit for optimal operation and management.

detailed_description.heading: Wide Compatibility and Flexible Installation
detailed_description.text: The RMK-2/10 is compatible with a variety of MikroTik router models, ensuring a wide range of applications. It is specifically designed to accommodate devices that do not come with rackmount options out of the box, transforming them into rack-ready units for enhanced organization and deployment efficiency. It also, allows installing two of the smaller MikroTik form-factor devices within MikroTik SR-10U rack or other traditional 19-inch racks. Alternatively, you can permanently remove a part of the bracket to install a single 200 mm device into a classic 10-inch rack.

detailed_description.heading: Compatible with:
detailed_description.text: CSS610-8G-2S+IN, CRS109-8G-1S-2HnD-IN, CRS112-8G-4S-IN, CRS310-1G-5S-4S+IN, CRS112-8P-4S-IN, and other 200mm units!
